_comment: Template for .claude/settings.local.json — copy this to settings.local.json and tailor per operator. NEVER commit settings.local.json (it is gitignored). This template documents the shape, safe-default permissions, and the governance expectation that every authorized MCP server or Bash allowlist entry carries an operator-level justification.

_governance_notes.on_enabling_bash_wildcards: Prefer scoped forms like Bash(git:*) or Bash(npm:*) over Bash(*). Record justification alongside each added entry.
_governance_notes.on_enabling_mcp_servers: Each entry in enabledMcpjsonServers must have a justification in active-variables.yaml under mcp_authorized_tools per docs/governance/mcp-governance.md.
_governance_notes.on_writing_delete_permissions: Delete permissions are denied by default. If an agent truly needs them, scope to a directory (e.g. Delete(reports/current/**)).
_governance_notes.on_committing_this_file: settings.local.example.json IS committed (documents the contract). settings.local.json is NEVER committed (operator-specific state).
